query:
SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 AND phase LIKE 'group_%' GROUP BY phase ORDER BY phase;
SELECT id, teamAName, teamBName, matchDate, groupName FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 AND phase IN ('group_e','group_f','group_g','group_h') ORDER BY matchDate LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 AND phase LIKE 'group_%' GROUP BY phase ORDER BY phase;
SELECT id, teamAName, teamBName, matchDate, groupName FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 AND phase IN ('group_e','group_f','group_g','group_h') ORDER BY matchDate LIMIT 20;
